Pañcakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Pañcaṅgikavagga/S.text: Idaṁ paccayapaccavekkhaṇañāṇaṁ (Syā, Ka) Dī-Tṭha 3. 245 piṭṭhepi passitabbaṁ.

Pañcakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Pañcaṅgikavagga/P.text: Idaṁ paccayapaccavekkhaṇañāṇaṁ (Syā, Ka) Dī-Tṭha 3. 245 piṭṭhepi passitabbaṁ.
Sandentassa (Sī, Syā, Ka) Ma-Tṭha 2. 222; Dī-Tṭha 1. 195 piṭṭhesupi passitabbaṁ.

Pañcakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Sumanavagga/Mahās.text: Brahāti mahā, vaneti aṭaviyaṁ (Sī), brahāvaneti aṭaviyaṁ (Ka)

Pañcakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Muṇḍarājavagga/Ād.text: Brahāti mahā, vaneti aṭaviyaṁ (Sī), brahāvaneti aṭaviyaṁ (Ka)

Pañcakanipātaṭṭhakathā/83Yodhājīvavagga/.text: Kavikatāti (sabbattha, Saṁ 1. 457 piṭṭhe ca) Ṭīkā pana oloketabbā.
Pana vāsi-ādīni gāhāpento (Sī), pana vāsi-ādīhi gāhāpento (Ka)

Pañcakanipātaṭṭhakathā/172Āghātavagga/Ni.text: Marisāmi (Sī, Ka) Vi-Ṭṭha 1. 175; Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 206 piṭṭhesupi passitabbaṁ.

Pañcakanipātaṭṭhakathā/205Brāhmaṇavagga/.text: Aparāparā (Sī), apare (Syā, Ka) Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 290 piṭṭhepi passitabbaṁ.

Chakkanipātaṭṭhakathā/Dhammikavagga/Miga.text: Anāḷhiyoti na aḍḍho (Sī), anaddhikoti na addho (Syā), anāḷikoti anaḷo (Ka)

Chakkanipātaṭṭhakathā/Dhammikavagga/Iṇas.text: Anāḷhiyoti na aḍḍho (Sī), anaddhikoti na addho (Syā), anāḷikoti anaḷo (Ka)

Chakkanipātaṭṭhakathā/Mahāvagga/Āsavasut.text: ( ) Ayaṁ saṁvaṇṇanākkamo Sīhaḷa-potthakeyeva atthi. Ṭīkāyaṁ pana tabbaṇṇanā dissati. Tasmā Pāḷiyampi “yato kho bhikkhave bhikkhuno”ti-ādinā nigamanavākyena bhavitabbaṁ. Ma 1. 14 piṭṭhepi passitabbaṁ.

Chakkanipātaṭṭhakathā/Mahāvagga/Hatthisā.text: ( ) Ayaṁ saṁvaṇṇanākkamo Sīhaḷa-potthakeyeva atthi. Ṭīkāyaṁ pana tabbaṇṇanā dissati. Tasmā Pāḷiyampi “yato kho bhikkhave bhikkhuno”ti-ādinā nigamanavākyena bhavitabbaṁ. Ma 1. 14 piṭṭhepi passitabbaṁ.

Aṭṭhakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Mahāvagga/Sīhasut.text: Na paṭikkamissatīti (Sī), na paṭikkamissati (Ka) Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 63 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.
Kiccavasena eva (Sī, Syā, Ka) Dī-Ṭṭha 1. 248; Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 65 piṭṭhesu pana passitabbaṁ.
Saccasaṅkhātaṁ paṭipadaṁ paṭipajjati (Sī) 3. Jirantīti (Sī, Syā) 4. Na sahati (Syā)

Aṭṭhakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Mahāvagga/Assājān.text: Kiccavasena eva (Sī, Syā, Ka) Dī-Ṭṭha 1. 248; Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 65 piṭṭhesu pana passitabbaṁ.
Aññāṇatā vaṭṭamūlasaṅkhātamalanti avijjā (Sī), aññāṇabhūtā vaṭṭamūlasaṅkhātamalandhakārā avijjā (Ka)

Aṭṭhakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Mahāvagga/Malasut.text: Aññāṇatā vaṭṭamūlasaṅkhātamalanti avijjā (Sī), aññāṇabhūtā vaṭṭamūlasaṅkhātamalandhakārā avijjā (Ka)

Aṭṭhakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Mahāvagga/Pahārād.text: So hi kira kūlato (Sī), so hi tīrappadesato (Syā)
Manoharapadasilāni (Sī, Ka), manoharapadarasilāni (Syā), Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 25 piṭṭhepi passitabbaṁ.

Aṭṭhakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Gahapativagga/Paṭ.text: Yaṁ assa kodhacittaṁ, tathā maṁ so āha (Sī)

Aṭṭhakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Gahapativagga/Dut.text: Vigatabyayanti (Sī), vigatantībhūtaṁ nittaṇhanti (Syā), niyatibhūtaṁ nittaṇhanti (Dī-Ṭṭha 3. 246 piṭṭhe.)

Aṭṭhakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Dānavagga/Paṭhama.text: Dānaṁ sabbatthasādhakaṁ (Sī) Visuddhi 1. 300 piṭṭhe ca Ṭīkā pana passitabbā.
Piyavācena (Sī, Syā, Ka) Dī-Ṭṭha 3. 227 piṭṭhepi passitabbaṁ.

Aṭṭhakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Dānavagga/Khettas.text: Dānaṁ sabbatthasādhakaṁ (Sī) Visuddhi 1. 300 piṭṭhe ca Ṭīkā pana passitabbā.

Aṭṭhakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Uposathavagga/910.text: Loko karaṇamattāya āraddhattā (Sī), loko idhaloke karaṇakammatthāya vīriyassa āraddhattā (Syā)

Aṭṭhakanipātaṭṭhakathā/61Gotamīvagga/Dīg.text: Ajaddhumārikanti anāthamaraṇaṁ (Sī), addhamārikanti anāthamaraṇaṁ (Syā) Ma-Ṭṭha 2. 191 piṭṭhe ajajjitanti padassa saṁvaṇṇanāyapi saddhiṁ saṁsandetabbaṁ.

Aṭṭhakanipātaṭṭhakathā/61Gotamīvagga/Bha.text: Gatapalipaṁ taṁ evarūpaṁ pajaṁ (Sī), evarūpaṁ hi pajaṁ (Syā)

Aṭṭhakanipātaṭṭhakathā/61Gotamīvagga/910.text: Ajaddhumārikanti anāthamaraṇaṁ (Sī), addhamārikanti anāthamaraṇaṁ (Syā) Ma-Ṭṭha 2. 191 piṭṭhe ajajjitanti padassa saṁvaṇṇanāyapi saddhiṁ saṁsandetabbaṁ.
Avibhūtaṁ ṭhānaṁ appamāṇaṁ (Sī), adhibhūtaṁ vā nappamāṇaṁ (Syā)

Aṭṭhakanipātaṭṭhakathā/72Bhūmicālavagga/.text: So na ruccati (Ka, Dī-Ṭṭha 2. 145; Saṁ-Ṭṭha 3. 283 piṭṭhesu ca)

Navakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Sīhanādavagga/Sīha.text: Rajoharaṇanti rājakulādīnaṁ na sammajjaniyā sammajjanti, coḷakena pana puñchanti, tassetaṁ nāmaṁ (Sī, Syā)

Navakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Sattāvāsavagga/Pañ.text: Asārāgadhammanti na saṁrajjanasabhāvaṁ (Sī), asarāgadhammanti na rāgena sārajjanasabhāvaṁ (Syā)

Navakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Mahāvagga/Lokāyati.text: Kaṇṭhappamāṇā (Sī, Syā, Ka) Ma-Ṭṭha 1. 357; Saṁ-Ṭṭha 2. 207 piṭṭhesupi passitabbaṁ.

Dasakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Nāthavagga/Paṭhama.text: Ariyavāsāti ariyā ettha vasiṁsu vasanti vasissantīti ariyavāsā (Sī, Syā) Dī-Ṭṭha 3. 234 piṭṭhepi passitabbaṁ.

variants.reading: Ariyavāsāti ariyā ettha vasiṁsu vasanti vasissantīti ariyavāsā

Dasakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Nāthavagga/Dutiyaa.text: Ariyassa vāsoti (Sī), ariyassa vāsattā ariyavāsoti (Syā, Dī-Ṭṭha 3. 234 piṭṭhe ca)

Dasakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Mahāvagga/Sīhanāda.text: Saṇṭhātuṁ sakkhissanti (Sī), saṇṭhātuṁ sakkhissanti, te hanti (Syā)
Nārāyanasaṅkhātabalanti (Sī, Syā) Ma-Ṭṭha 1. 332; Abhi-Ṭṭha 2. 380 piṭṭhesupi passitabbaṁ.

Dasakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Mahāvagga/Adhivutt.text: Tesaṁ tesaṁ dassanabhūtāya desanāya padhānattā (Sī), tesaṁ tesaṁ padabhūtāya desanāya padaṭṭhānattā (Syā)

Dasakanipātaṭṭhakathā/Mahāvagga/Paṭhamam.text: Aṁ 3. 346 piṭṭhe. 2. Paṭṭhayiko viya (Ka) Dī-Ṭṭha 3. 157 piṭṭhepi passitabbaṁ.

Dasakanipātaṭṭhakathā/61Sacittavagga/Gir.text: Rakhasāti (Sī, Syā, Khu 7. 10; Khu 8. 28 piṭṭhesu ca)

Dasakanipātaṭṭhakathā/94Theravagga/Byāka.text: Kathanasīlo vivaṭaṁ katheti (Sī), katthanasīlo vivaṭaṁ katvā katheti (Ka)

Dasakanipātaṭṭhakathā/105Upālivagga/Utti.text: Honti (sabbattha) Dī-Ṭṭha 3. 64; Saṁ-Ṭṭha 3. 102 piṭṭhesu pana passitabbaṁ.
